response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most roles centered on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web technologies; there is no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial IoT protocols required for the role, and cloud exposure is limited to AWS CDK without Azure or embedded systems context.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership
Extensive background in testing, CI/CD, and agile practices
concerns: Minimal to no professional C++ or STL usage in recent roles
No exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or OT protocols
Lacks experience in on-premises industrial automation or real-time embedded systems
